issues.objection: Tags on 7.29 (long-term-thinking, first-principles, operator-system-coupling) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Forward-points to Ch 8 explicitly; coheres with 7.3's rarity-of-substrate-knowing claim; coheres with 2.72's brāhmī-sthiti as terminal disposition (engineering shadow scoped down). STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.29: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
